notes: 151 closed 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs on plan INSUL layer; anonymous insulation hatch fragment of the floor plan.

rationale.evidence: All 151 entities are LWPOLYLINE with vertices=5 on the single xref layer X-평면도(기본형)$0$INSUL (sampled handles 3C70–3C8D). The layer token INSUL under 평면도(기본형) marks thermal-insulation graphics in a standard floor plan; histograms are 100% LWPOLYLINE/INSUL with no LINE, INSERT, TEXT, or dimension entities.
rationale.rule: An anonymous *U block made only of uniform closed LWPOLYLINEs on a floor-plan INSUL material layer is a plan-geometry fill fragment (평면 부분도); insulation co-locates with the envelope but those polylines are not wall-face lines.
rationale.counterfactual: If the layer were 벽체/WALL or the entities were long parallel LINE pairs at ~100–200 mm spacing, wall_likelihood would rise and wall_line_handles could be populated; a fixture-name INSERT or furniture layer would flip the role to 심볼 or 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: No vertex coordinates or LINE-derived bbox are given, so each 5-vertex polyline cannot be measured as hatch batt versus thin cavity outline, nor can exterior versus party-wall placement be verified.

notes: 25 closed 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs on plan INSUL layer; anonymous insulation hatch fragment of the floor plan.

rationale.evidence: All 25 entities are LWPOLYLINE with vertices=5 on X-평면도(기본형)$0$INSUL (handles 3D0C–3D24). dxf_name and layer histograms are single-valued; no LINE/INSERT/TEXT/HATCH appear, so this is a compact insulation-fill anonymous block from the bound floor-plan xref.
rationale.rule: Uniform closed polylines confined to a 평면도…$INSUL layer classify as 평면 부분도 material fill, with wall_line_handles empty because insulation polygons are not linear wall faces.
rationale.counterfactual: Wall-layer naming or long parallel collinear edges at wall thickness would raise wall_likelihood and allow listing face handles; DEFPOINTS/*D dimension content would flip the role to 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Without coordinates it is unclear whether the 25 quads form a short exterior-envelope run or an interior insulated partition strip.

notes: 국기계양대 flagpole-holder symbol: WIPEOUT pair + nested fixture INSERT + ~3320×126 mm LINE frame on layer 0.

rationale.evidence: Histogram INSERT=1, LINE=20, WIPEOUT=2. INSERT handle 3D7E places block X-평면도(기본형)$0$국기계양대 (flagpole holder); WIPEOUTs 3D7C/3D7D and twenty LINEs on layer 0 form a notched frame. LINE bbox [-1660,-103.5,0,1660,22.5,0] is fixture-scale (~3.3 m × 0.13 m), not room-partition scale; inner bars (e.g. 3D7F/3D81) show a ~50 mm flange gap.
rationale.rule: WIPEOUT masks plus a nested named-fixture INSERT plus a thin closed LINE bracket on layer 0 indicate a plan fixture symbol (심볼), not structural wall geometry.
rationale.counterfactual: Removing the 국기계양대 INSERT and stretching the LINEs into multi-meter parallel pairs at ~100–200 mm spacing without WIPEOUT would reclassify as 평면 부분도 with high wall_likelihood.
rationale.uncertainty: Nested 국기계양대 contents are not expanded here, so any wall geometry inside that child block cannot be inspected; the 50 mm parallel gap could be mistaken for a thin wall without the fixture name and scale.

notes: 국기계양대 flagpole-holder symbol: WIPEOUT pair + nested fixture INSERT + ~920×126 mm LINE frame on layer 0.

rationale.evidence: Same composition as sibling flagpole wrappers: INSERT 3D9A of 국기계양대, WIPEOUTs 3D98/3D99, and 20 LINEs on layer 0. bbox [-460,-103.5,0,460,22.5,0] ≈ 920×126 mm — a shorter variant of the same fixture bracket (inner span ~876 mm via 3D9B/3D9D).
rationale.rule: Named fixture INSERT + WIPEOUT + small-scale layer-0 LINE frame → 심볼 regardless of horizontal span length among variants.
rationale.counterfactual: If LINEs spanned room lengths as wall-thickness parallel pairs with no fixture INSERT, role would flip to 평면 부분도; furniture-layer geometry would flip to 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Child block geometry is opaque; whether this shorter span marks a different wall bay or a scaled instance cannot be told from the projection alone.
